title: selago atherstonei
intro: Selago atherstonei, also known as Atherstone's Selago, is a plant species native to southern Africa. It is a shrubby perennial plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Selago atherstonei include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
